stocks.impact_theory: NVIDIA's GTC conference announced major advancements in AI chips like Blackwell full production ramp-up and new partnerships, boosting economic growth in AI sector by accelerating data center builds. Market psychology: renewed FOMO among investors after brief AI fatigue. Historical parallels: Similar to 2023 ChatGPT hype driving NVDA 200%+ run. Analogies: 1. Like fueling a rocket engine mid-flight for faster orbit. 2. Pouring gasoline on the AI bonfire.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Goldman Sachs raised PT to $250 (36% upside), GTC news bigger than expected per analysts; X sentiment highly positive with high engagement posts on new chips (from x_semantic_search: 80% bullish posts latest 20); web news highlights revenue forecasts $215B FY26.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 8-12% gains in 1-2 weeks on momentum; enter at $183 target $205.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid short, or small short if overbought RSI>80 for 3-5% pullback.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Overvaluation bubble burst if AI hype fades; competition from AMD; supply chain delays.

stocks.justification: Strong analyst upgrades, recent conference momentum, high X volume confirms sentiment shift.

stocks.impact_theory: Tesla delayed robotaxi unveil to October per WSJ leak, dampening EV/autonomy hype. Economic: Slows capex in autonomy, pressures margins. Psychology: Frustration after Musk hype. Parallels: 2020 battery day miss caused 20% drop. Analogies: 1. Promised feast, served appetizer. 2. Car stalled at green light.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Leak on delay sparked selloff; X posts mixed-negative (60% bearish latest); prior news on Q1 deliveries miss.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long risky, wait for dip buy at $230 for rebound.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short for 10% downside to $220; high short interest opportunity.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Musk tweet reversal; China sales surprise; broader EV rally.

stocks.justification: Reliable sources on delay, but Musk history of surprises tempers confidence.

stocks.impact_theory: Apple won partial antitrust appeal, easing DOJ pressure on App Store. Economic: Preserves $25B revenue stream. Psychology: Relief rally. Parallels: 2021 Epic win boost. Analogies: 1. Bullet dodged in court shootout. 2. Gate reopened for golden goose.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Court ruling favorable; X buzz positive on services growth; analyst notes stable.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for steady 5% to $240 on services beat.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Full DOJ case escalation; China iPhone sales slump.

stocks.justification: Partial win positive but ongoing litigation.

stocks.impact_theory: Palantir won $500M DoD contract for AI platforms. Economic: Accelerates gov revenue to 60%. Psychology: Meme-to-legit shift. Parallels: SNOW gov deals 2022. Analogies: 1. Government check cashed big. 2. AI spy toolkit upgrade.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Contract announcement drove volume; X hype high (retweets 10k+); commercial growth too.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: High valuation; contract delays; insider selling.

stocks.impact_theory: SMCI reported record server shipments tied to NVDA demand. Economic: AI infra boom. Psychology: Catch-up to NVDA rally. Parallels: 2023 AI server surge. Analogies: 1. Building the AI skyscrapers. 2. Tractor trailer for chip freight.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings beat whispers; X trader buzz linking to GTC; supply chain intact.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Margin squeeze; NVDA slowdown; accounting issues.

stocks.justification: Tied to NVDA but higher beta, volatile.
